problem id: 2dcb7ec6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  11111010 -> 11010111
  11101001 -> 01001111
  10001110 -> 01110100
  00001010 -> 01010000
  10010110 -> 10110100
  01110110 -> 10110011
  10101111 -> 01111101
  00111011 -> 11011001
  00101011 -> 01011001

query: 00010110
predicted answer: 10110000
